description: This class includes support activities to animal production carried out on a fee or contract basis.
includes: activities to promote propagation, growth and output of animals
herd testing, droving services, agistment services, gelding of poultry, cleaning of agricultural premises (hen houses, piggeries etc.)
operation of feedlots engaged in custom fattening of cattle
sorting and packing of eggs on a fee or contract basis
excludes: provision of grazing land only, see 6810
